name: session_clean
description: Session cleanup tool that resets Overlord11 between tasks. Purges all workspace session folders and clears active entries from Consciousness.md, while preserving Memory.md (permanent preferences/rules) and the logs/ directory (audit trail). Use at the start of a fresh task or after a completed project to ensure a clean slate. Optionally archives workspace sessions before deleting them.

action.description: Operation to perform. clean: full reset — purge workspace sessions and clear Consciousness.md active entries. purge_workspace: remove workspace session folders only. reset_consciousness: clear active entries in Consciousness.md only (keeps persistent/shared context). status: report what would be cleaned without making changes.

archive.description: Before deleting workspace sessions, move them to workspace/archive/ instead of permanently deleting. Defaults to false.

older_than_days.description: Only purge workspace sessions older than this many days. Defaults to 0 (purge all sessions). Set to 7 to keep sessions from the last week.

dry_run.description: Report what would be cleaned without making any changes. Defaults to false.

session_id.description: Optional session ID for logging this cleanup to logs/master.jsonl.
